disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: The World Health Organization declared an end to the deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship which sparked international alarm, after the last person left quarantine. | via ANC 24/7 Link to full story in the comments section. - facebook
